name: Virginia Certified Nursing Assistant Certification
description: Already certified as a CNA? Here's whether your certification transfers to Virginia - endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.

address.description:
Virginia Board of Nursing
Perimeter Center
9960 Mayland Drive, Suite 300
Richmond, VA 23233-1463

requiredDocuments.name: Proof of Training
requiredDocuments.description: Certificate of completion from your approved CNA training program.

requiredDocuments.name: State Competency Exam Results
requiredDocuments.description: Official verification of passing your state's nurse aide competency evaluation.

fingerprinting.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan OR FD-258 hard card via mail

mainEntity.name: Who administers the Virginia CNA exam?

acceptedAnswer.text: The VA nurse aide exam is administered by Credentia. Register at credentia.com/test-takers/va.

mainEntity.name: How do I verify a Virginia CNA?

acceptedAnswer.text: Use the DHP License Lookup at dhp.virginiainteractive.org/Lookup/Index or contact VBON at (804) 367-4515 or nurseaide@dhp.virginia.gov.
